notes: I4 + R2-I3 unicode bypass vectors that should still be neutralized after NFKC + Cf strip + combining-mark strip + Cyrillic→Latin homoglyph fold. Attack classes covered: zero-width joiners splitting tokens (ZWJ), zero-width non-joiner (ZWNJ), bidi controls, confusable characters (NFKC collapses full-width → ASCII), combining marks (decomposed Latin+acute), Cyrillic homoglyphs (Cyrillic characters that visually render as Latin equivalents), word joiners, BOM injection. The sanitize pipeline MUST neutralize every case before the INJECTION_TOKENS scan.
